---
title: "BBB 26 — Painel de Reações"
subtitle: "Análise estratégica do Big Brother Brasil 2026 — reações, relações, votos e dinâmicas de poder"
lang: pt-BR
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from pathlib import Path
from collections import OrderedDict
from datetime import datetime

import sys
sys.path.append(str(Path("scripts").resolve()))
from data_utils import (
    require_clean_manual_events, setup_bbb_dark_theme,
    load_paredoes_raw, load_index_data, load_game_timeline,
    avatar_html as _avatar_html,
    REACTION_EMOJI, REACTION_SLUG_TO_LABEL, SENTIMENT_WEIGHTS,
    POSITIVE, MILD_NEGATIVE, STRONG_NEGATIVE, GROUP_COLORS,
    POWER_EVENT_EMOJI, POWER_EVENT_LABELS,
    ANALYSIS_DESCRIPTIONS, render_cronologia_html,
)

require_clean_manual_events()
setup_bbb_dark_theme()

```

```{python}
#| label: load-data

index_data = load_index_data()

if not index_data:
    raise RuntimeError("index_data.json não encontrado. Execute scripts/build_derived_data.py")

latest = index_data.get("latest", {})
MEMBER_OF = index_data.get("member_of", {})
AVATARS = index_data.get("avatars", {})
```

```{python}
#| label: viz-functions
#| include: false

def make_sentiment_ranking(rows, title_suffix="", fixed_height=None):
    """Retorna go.Figure com ranking horizontal de sentimento."""
    if not rows:
        return go.Figure()

    df_sent = pd.DataFrame(rows).sort_values('score', ascending=True)

    color_map = {name: GROUP_COLORS.get(m, '#999')
                 for name, m in zip(df_sent['name'], df_sent['group'])}

    fig = go.Figure()
    fig.add_trace(go.Bar(
        y=df_sent['name'],
        x=df_sent['score'],
        orientation='h',
        marker_color=[color_map[n] for n in df_sent['name']],
        text=[f"{s:+.1f}" for s in df_sent['score']],
        textposition='outside',
        hovertemplate='%{y}: %{x:+.1f}<br>❤️: %{customdata[0]} | Neg: %{customdata[1]}<extra></extra>',
        customdata=list(zip(df_sent['hearts'], df_sent['negative'])),
        showlegend=False
    ))

    title = "Ranking de Sentimento"
    if title_suffix:
        title += f" — {title_suffix}"

    left_margin = 150
    chart_height = fixed_height if fixed_height else max(500, len(df_sent) * 32)

    fig.update_layout(
        title=title,
        xaxis_title="Score de Sentimento",
        yaxis_title="",
        height=chart_height,
        margin=dict(l=left_margin),
        shapes=[dict(type='line', x0=0, x1=0, y0=-0.5, y1=len(df_sent)-0.5,
                     line=dict(color='red', dash='dash', width=1))]
    )

    for group, color in GROUP_COLORS.items():
        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=[None], y=[None], mode='markers',
            marker=dict(size=10, color=color),
            name=group, showlegend=True
        ))

    return fig


def make_cross_table_heatmap(participants, matrix, title_suffix=""):
    """Retorna go.Figure com heatmap da tabela cruzada de reações."""
    active_names_ht = sorted([p['name'] for p in participants
                              if not p.get('characteristics', {}).get('eliminated')])

    heat_data = np.zeros((len(active_names_ht), len(active_names_ht)))
    rxn_labels = []
    for i, giver in enumerate(active_names_ht):
        row_labels = []
        for j, receiver in enumerate(active_names_ht):
            if giver == receiver:
                heat_data[i, j] = np.nan
                row_labels.append('—')
            else:
                rxn = matrix.get((giver, receiver), '')
                weight = SENTIMENT_WEIGHTS.get(rxn, 0)
                heat_data[i, j] = weight
                emoji = REACTION_EMOJI.get(rxn, '?')
                row_labels.append(emoji)
        rxn_labels.append(row_labels)

    short_names = [n.split()[0] if len(n) > 12 else n for n in active_names_ht]

    fig = go.Figure(data=go.Heatmap(
        z=heat_data,
        x=short_names,
        y=short_names,
        colorscale=[
            [0, '#d73027'],
            [0.25, '#fc8d59'],
            [0.5, '#ffffbf'],
            [1.0, '#1a9850'],
        ],
        zmin=-1, zmax=1,
        text=[[rxn_labels[i][j] for j in range(len(active_names_ht))] for i in range(len(active_names_ht))],
        texttemplate='%{text}',
        textfont=dict(size=14),
        hovertemplate='%{y} → %{x}: %{text}<extra></extra>',
        colorbar=dict(title="Sentimento", tickvals=[-1, -0.5, 0, 1],
                      ticktext=['Forte Neg', 'Leve Neg', 'Neutro', 'Positivo'])
    ))

    title = "Mapa de Reações"
    if title_suffix:
        title += f" — {title_suffix}"

    fig.update_layout(
        title=title,
        xaxis_title="Receptor ←",
        yaxis_title="Emissor →",
        height=750,
        xaxis=dict(tickangle=45, side='bottom'),
        yaxis=dict(autorange='reversed')
    )

    return fig


def make_cross_table_html(cross_data, title_suffix=""):
    """Retorna HTML string com tabela cruzada de reações (sticky header/column)."""
    active_names = cross_data.get("names", [])
    matrix = cross_data.get("matrix", [])
    short_names = [n.split()[0] if len(n) > 10 else n for n in active_names]

    # Color mapping based on sentiment
    def get_cell_style(rxn):
        if not rxn:
            return "background: #444; color: #888;"
        weight = SENTIMENT_WEIGHTS.get(rxn, 0)
        if weight == 1:  # Positive
            return "background: #1a9850; color: #fff;"
        elif weight == -0.5:  # Mild negative
            return "background: #fc8d59; color: #000;"
        elif weight == -1:  # Strong negative
            return "background: #d73027; color: #fff;"
        return "background: #ffffbf; color: #000;"

    # Build HTML table
    html = []
    html.append(f'''
<div class="scroll-x">
<style>
.cross-table {{
    border-collapse: separate;
    border-spacing: 0;
    font-size: var(--fs-base);
    width: max-content;
}}
.cross-table th, .cross-table td {{
    padding: 4px 6px;
    text-align: center;
    border: 1px solid #555;
    min-width: 36px;
    white-space: nowrap;
}}
.cross-table thead th {{
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    background: #222;
    z-index: 2;
    font-weight: bold;
}}
.cross-table tbody th {{
    position: sticky;
    left: 0;
    background: #222;
    z-index: 1;
    font-weight: bold;
    text-align: right;
}}
.cross-table thead th:first-child {{
    z-index: 3;
    left: 0;
}}
.cross-table td {{ font-size: var(--fs-xl); }}
.cross-table td:hover {{ outline: 2px solid #fff; }}
</style>
<table class="cross-table">
<thead>
<tr>
<th class="u-s001">→ deu / ↓ recebeu</th>
''')

    # Header row with receiver names
    for short in short_names:
        html.append(f'<th>{short}</th>')
    html.append('</tr></thead><tbody>')

    # Data rows
    for i, giver in enumerate(active_names):
        html.append(f'<tr><th>{short_names[i]}</th>')
        for j, receiver in enumerate(active_names):
            if giver == receiver:
                html.append('<td class="u-s117">—</td>')
            else:
                rxn = matrix[i][j] if i < len(matrix) and j < len(matrix[i]) else ""
                emoji = REACTION_EMOJI.get(rxn, '?') if rxn else '?'
                style = get_cell_style(rxn)
                tooltip = f"{giver} → {receiver}: {rxn or 'N/A'}"
                html.append(f'<td style=\"{style}\" title=\"{tooltip}\">{emoji}</td>')
        html.append('</tr>')

    html.append('</tbody></table></div>')

    return '\n'.join(html)


def make_reaction_summary_html(summary_data, collapsed_rows=5):
    """Retorna HTML com tabela de reações recebidas, colapsável com cores."""
    summary_rows = summary_data.get("rows", [])
    max_hearts = summary_data.get("max_hearts", 1) or 1
    max_neg = summary_data.get("max_neg", 1) or 1
    n_total = len(summary_rows)

    def heart_color(val):
        if val == 0: return "color: #666;"
        intensity = min(val / max_hearts, 1)
        if intensity > 0.7: return "background: #1a9850; color: #fff; font-weight: bold;"
        if intensity > 0.4: return "background: #91cf60; color: #000;"
        return "color: #a6d96a;"

    def neg_color(val):
        if val == 0: return "color: #666;"
        if val >= 3: return "background: #d73027; color: #fff; font-weight: bold;"
        if val >= 2: return "background: #fc8d59; color: #000;"
        return "color: #fdae61;"

    def score_color(val):
        if val >= 10: return "background: #1a9850; color: #fff; font-weight: bold;"
        if val >= 5: return "color: #66bd63;"
        if val >= 0: return "color: #a6d96a;"
        if val >= -5: return "color: #fdae61;"
        if val >= -10: return "color: #f46d43;"
        return "background: #d73027; color: #fff; font-weight: bold;"

    html = []
    html.append(f'''
<style>
.summary-table {{
    border-collapse: collapse;
    font-size: var(--fs-base);
    width: 100%;
}}
.summary-table th, .summary-table td {{
    padding: 6px 8px;
    text-align: center;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #444;
}}
.summary-table th {{
    background: #222;
    position: sticky;
    top: 0;
    z-index: 1;
}}
.summary-table th:first-child, .summary-table td:first-child {{
    text-align: left;
    position: sticky;
    left: 0;
    background: #222;
    z-index: 2;
}}
.summary-table thead th:first-child {{ z-index: 3; }}
.summary-table tbody tr:hover {{ background: #333; }}
.collapsed-rows {{ display: none; }}
.expand-btn {{
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 10px;
    margin-top: 8px;
    background: #2a2a2a;
    border: 1px solid #444;
    border-radius: 6px;
    color: #ccc;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: var(--fs-base);
}}
.expand-btn:hover {{ background: #333; }}
</style>
<div class="scroll-x">
<table class="summary-table" id="reaction-summary-table">
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Participante</th>
<th>❤️</th>
<th>🌱</th>
<th>💼</th>
<th>🍪</th>
<th>🐍</th>
<th>🎯</th>
<th>🤮</th>
<th>🤥</th>
<th>💔</th>
<th>Score</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
''')

    for i, r in enumerate(summary_rows):
        row_class = 'collapsed-rows' if i >= collapsed_rows else ''
        html.append(f'<tr class="{row_class}">')
        html.append(f'<td>{r["name"]}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{heart_color(r["hearts"])}">{r["hearts"]}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{neg_color(r["planta"])}">{r["planta"] or "·"}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{neg_color(r["mala"])}">{r["mala"] or "·"}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{neg_color(r["biscoito"])}">{r["biscoito"] or "·"}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{neg_color(r["cobra"])}">{r["cobra"] or "·"}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{neg_color(r["alvo"])}">{r["alvo"] or "·"}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{neg_color(r["vomito"])}">{r["vomito"] or "·"}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{neg_color(r["mentiroso"])}">{r["mentiroso"] or "·"}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{neg_color(r["coracao_partido"])}">{r["coracao_partido"] or "·"}</td>')
        html.append(f'<td style="{score_color(r["score"])}">{r["score"]:+.1f}</td>')
        html.append('</tr>')

    html.append('</tbody></table></div>')

    if n_total > collapsed_rows:
        html.append(f'''
<button class="expand-btn" onclick="
    var rows = document.querySelectorAll('.collapsed-rows');
    var btn = this;
    if (btn.dataset.expanded === 'true') {{
        rows.forEach(r => r.style.display = 'none');
        btn.innerHTML = '▼ Ver todos os {n_total} participantes';
        btn.dataset.expanded = 'false';
    }} else {{
        rows.forEach(r => r.style.display = 'table-row');
        btn.innerHTML = '▲ Mostrar menos';
        btn.dataset.expanded = 'true';
    }}
" data-expanded="false">▼ Ver todos os {n_total} participantes</button>
''')

    return '\n'.join(html)


```

# Cronologia do Jogo {#cronologia-jogo}

Linha do tempo dos eventos da temporada — próximos eventos e histórico recente.

```{python}
#| label: timeline-events-index
#| output: asis

timeline_events = load_game_timeline().get("events", [])
if timeline_events:
    print(render_cronologia_html(timeline_events))
else:
    print("<p class='text-muted'>Nenhum evento na cronologia.</p>")
```

```{python}
#| label: compute-highlights
#| output: asis

date_display_pt = index_data.get("highlights", {}).get("date_display", "")
hl_cards = index_data.get("highlights", {}).get("cards", [])

def av(name, size=48, border_color="#555"):
    """Avatar image tag, clickable to the participant's profile."""
    slug = name.lower().replace(" ", "-")
    return _avatar_html(name, AVATARS, size=size, show_name=False,
                        link=f'#perfil-{slug}', border_color=border_color,
                        fallback_initials=True)

def card_header(icon, title, link=None, badge=None, source_tag=None, subtitle=None):
    """Card header with icon, title, optional link, badge, data source tag, and subtitle."""
    title_html = title
    link_html = f' <a href="{link}" class="fs-xs u-s254">ver mais ↗</a>' if link else ""
    badge_html = f' <span class="fs-xs u-s187">{badge}</span>' if badge else ""
    source_html = f' <span class="fs-2xs u-s253">{source_tag}</span>' if source_tag else ""
    subtitle_html = f'<div class="fs-sm u-s258">{subtitle}</div>' if subtitle else ""
    return (f'<div class="u-s073">'
            f'<div class="u-s333">'
            f'<span class="fs-2xl">{icon}</span>'
            f'<span class="fs-base u-s392">{title_html}</span>'
            f'{badge_html}{source_html}{link_html}'
            f'</div>'
            f'{subtitle_html}</div>')

def stat_chip(value, label, color="#888"):
    """Small stat chip."""
    return (f'<span class="u-s373">'
            f'<span class="fs-xl" style="font-weight:700;color:{color};">{value}</span>'
            f'<span class="fs-2xs u-s259">{label}</span></span>')

def progress_bar(value, max_val, color="#3498db", height=6):
    """Mini progress bar."""
    pct = min(100, value / max_val * 100) if max_val > 0 else 0
    return (f'<div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:{height//2}px;height:{height}px;width:100%;overflow:hidden;">'
            f'<div style="width:{pct:.0f}%;height:100%;background:{color};border-radius:{height//2}px;"></div></div>')


if not hl_cards:
    print(f'''<div class="dark-card tc u-s468">
📅 Primeiro dia de dados — sem comparações disponíveis ainda.</div>''')
else:
    # Extract context card data for the header
    ctx = next((c for c in hl_cards if c.get("type") == "context"), {})
    ctx_week = ctx.get("week", "?")
    ctx_days = ctx.get("days", 0)
    ctx_active = ctx.get("active", 0)

    # Section header with context stats
    print(f'''<div class="u-s442">
<h2 class="fs-2xl u-s435">📋 Destaques do Dia <span class="fs-base u-s250">({date_display_pt})</span></h2>
<div class="u-s399"></div>
<div class="fs-base u-s365">
<span>📅 <b class="text-light">Semana {ctx_week}</b></span>
<span>{ctx_days} dias de dados</span>
<span>{ctx_active} participantes ativos</span>
</div>
</div>''')

    print('<div class="u-s371">')

    for card in hl_cards:
        ctype = card.get("type")
        color = card.get("color", "#555")

        # ── 🏆 Ranking ──
        if ctype == "ranking":
            leader = card["leader"]
            streak = card.get("streak", 1)
            streak_txt = f"{streak}º dia consecutivo" if streak > 1 else "hoje"
            podium = card.get("podium", [])
            bottom3 = card.get("bottom3", [])
            mup = card.get("movers_up")
            mdown = card.get("movers_down")

            header = card_header(
                card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), streak_txt,
                source_tag="📸 Queridômetro hoje",
                subtitle="Score de hoje (❤️ = +1, negativas = −0.5 a −1). Dado do dia, não acumulado."
            )

            # ── Top 6 (vertical list, same style as movers) ──
            medals = ["🥇", "🥈", "🥉", "4º", "5º", "6º"]
            medal_borders = ["#f1c40f", "#c0c0c0", "#cd7f32", "#27ae60", "#27ae60", "#27ae60"]
            podium_html = '<div>'
            podium_html += '<div class="fs-2xs u-s060">⬆ Mais queridos</div>'
            podium_html += '<div class="u-s065">'
            for i, p in enumerate(podium[:6]):
                name = p["name"]
                score = p["score"]
                border = medal_borders[i] if i < len(medal_borders) else "#27ae60"
                label = medals[i] if i < len(medals) else f"{i+1}º"
                podium_html += (
                    f'<div class="u-s344">'
                    f'{av(name, 42, border)}'
                    f'<span class="fs-md u-s026">{label} {name.split()[0]} {score:+.1f}</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                )
            podium_html += '</div></div>'

            # ── Bottom 6 (vertical list, same style as movers) ──
            bottom_html = ""
            if bottom3:
                bottom_html = '<div>'
                bottom_html += '<div class="fs-2xs u-s060">⬇ Menos queridos</div>'
                bottom_html += '<div class="u-s065">'
                for p in bottom3[:6]:
                    name = p["name"]
                    score = p["score"]
                    score_color = "#e74c3c" if score < 0 else ("#f39c12" if score < 3 else "#aaa")
                    bottom_html += (
                        f'<div class="u-s340">'
                        f'{av(name, 42, "#e74c3c")}'
                        f'<span class="fs-md" style="color:{score_color};font-weight:700;">⬇ {name.split()[0]} {score:+.1f}</span>'
                        f'</div>'
                    )
                bottom_html += '</div></div>'

            # ── Movers (compact list: up to 3 risers + 3 fallers) ──
            movers_html = ""
            mup_list = mup if isinstance(mup, list) else ([mup] if mup else [])
            mdown_list = mdown if isinstance(mdown, list) else ([mdown] if mdown else [])
            if mup_list or mdown_list:
                movers_html = '<div>'
                movers_html += '<div class="fs-2xs u-s060">📅 Variação vs ontem</div>'
                movers_html += '<div class="u-s065">'
                for mu in mup_list:
                    movers_html += (
                        f'<div class="u-s345">'
                        f'{av(mu["name"], 42, "#27ae60")}'
                        f'<span class="fs-md u-s026">📈 {mu["name"].split()[0]} {mu["delta"]:+.1f}</span>'
                        f'</div>')
                for md in mdown_list:
                    movers_html += (
                        f'<div class="u-s341">'
                        f'{av(md["name"], 42, "#e74c3c")}'
                        f'<span class="text-neg fs-md">📉 {md["name"].split()[0]} {md["delta"]:+.1f}</span>'
                        f'</div>')
                movers_html += '</div></div>'

            # 3-column grid on desktop, stacks on mobile
            print(f'''<div class="dark-card" style="grid-column:1/-1;border-top:4px solid {color};padding:1rem 1.2rem;">
{header}
<div class="u-s370">
{podium_html}
{bottom_html}
{movers_html}
</div>
</div>''')

        # ── 📊 Changes ──
        elif ctype == "changes":
            total = card["total"]
            pct = card["pct"]
            imp = card["improve"]
            wor = card["worsen"]
            lat = card["lateral"]
            hg = card["hearts_gained"]
            hl_lost = card["hearts_lost"]
            direction_color = "#27ae60" if imp > wor else ("#e74c3c" if wor > imp else "#f39c12")

            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), source_tag="📅 Ontem → Hoje", subtitle="Reações do queridômetro que mudaram de ontem para hoje. Melhorias = score subiu, pioras = score caiu.")}
<div class="u-s332">
<span class="fs-4xl u-s393">{total}</span>
<span class="fs-base u-s001">reações mudaram <span style="color:{direction_color};font-weight:600;">({pct}%)</span></span>
</div>
<div class="u-s361">
{stat_chip(imp, "melhorias", "#27ae60")}
{stat_chip(wor, "pioras", "#e74c3c")}
{stat_chip(lat, "laterais", "#888")}
</div>
<div class="fs-md u-s362">
<span class="u-s054">+{hg} ❤️ ganhados</span> <span class="u-s005">-{hl_lost} ❤️ perdidos</span>
</div>
</div>''')

        # ── 💥 Dramatic + ⚠️ Hostilities — pair-based cards ──
        elif ctype in ("dramatic", "hostilities"):
            items = card.get("items", [])
            total = card.get("total", len(items))
            is_hostile = ctype == "hostilities"
            badge = f"{total}" if total > 1 else None
            if is_hostile:
                ch = card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), badge,
                    source_tag="📅 Ontem → Hoje",
                    subtitle="Quem passou a dar reação negativa a alguém que ainda dá ❤️ para eles. O receptor não sabe — ponto cego."
                )
            else:
                ch = card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), badge,
                    source_tag="📅 Ontem → Hoje",
                    subtitle="Trocas extremas: de ❤️ para negativo ou vice-versa. Quanto maior o salto, mais dramática."
                )
            pairs_html = '<div class="u-s358">'
            for it in items[:4]:
                g = it["giver"]
                r = it["receiver"]
                g_slug = g.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                r_slug = r.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                if is_hostile:
                    emoji = it.get("emoji", "?")
                    date_str = it.get("date", "")
                    try:
                        date_fmt = datetime.strptime(date_str, "%Y-%m-%d").strftime("%d/%m")
                    except Exception:
                        date_fmt = ""
                    label = f'{g.split()[0]} {emoji} {r.split()[0]}'
                    date_badge = f' <span class="fs-2xs" style="opacity:0.5">{date_fmt}</span>' if date_fmt else ""
                    g_color = "#f39c12"
                    r_color = "#e74c3c"
                else:
                    old_e = it.get("old_emoji", "?")
                    new_e = it.get("new_emoji", "?")
                    label = f'{old_e}→{new_e}'
                    date_badge = ""
                    g_color = "#e74c3c" if new_e == "❤️" else "#666"
                    r_color = "#27ae60" if new_e == "❤️" else "#e74c3c"
                pairs_html += (
                    f'<div class="u-s342" title="{g} → {r}">'
                    f'<a href="#perfil-{g_slug}" style="text-decoration:none">{av(g, 42, g_color)}</a>'
                    f'<span class="fs-md u-s017">{label}{date_badge}</span>'
                    f'<a href="#perfil-{r_slug}" style="text-decoration:none">{av(r, 42, r_color)}</a>'
                    f'</div>'
                )
            extra = total - 4
            if extra > 0:
                link = card.get("link", "#")
                pairs_html += f'<a href="{link}" class="fs-sm u-s349">+{extra} mais ↗</a>'
            pairs_html += '</div>'

            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{ch}
{pairs_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 🔥 Sincerão (unified: radar + contradictions) ──
        elif ctype == "sincerao":
            radar = card.get("radar", {})
            contras = card.get("contradictions", [])
            aligned_neg = card.get("aligned_neg", [])
            fmt = card.get("format", "")
            neg_ranked = radar.get("neg_ranked", [])
            pos_ranked = radar.get("pos_ranked", [])
            not_targeted = radar.get("not_targeted", [])

            # Format subtitle
            fmt_short = fmt.split("—")[0].strip() if "—" in fmt else (fmt[:50] if fmt else "")
            subtitle = fmt if fmt else "Resumo semanal do Sincerão × Queridômetro."

            body_html = '<div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;padding:4px 0">'

            # -- Most targeted (negative) -- show full ranked list
            if neg_ranked:
                neg_html = '<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px 10px;align-items:center">'
                neg_html += '<span class="fs-sm" style="opacity:0.6;min-width:80px">💣 Atacados</span>'
                for entry in neg_ranked:
                    n = entry["name"].split()[0]
                    slug = entry["name"].lower().replace(" ", "-")
                    c = entry["count"]
                    is_top = entry["count"] == neg_ranked[0]["count"]
                    weight = "font-weight:700" if is_top else "opacity:0.8"
                    neg_html += f'<a href="#perfil-{slug}" class="fs-sm" style="{weight};text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{n} <b>({c}x)</b></a>'
                neg_html += '</div>'
                body_html += neg_html

            # -- Most praised (positive) -- show full ranked list
            if pos_ranked:
                pos_html = '<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px 10px;align-items:center">'
                pos_html += '<span class="fs-sm" style="opacity:0.6;min-width:80px">🏆 Elogiados</span>'
                for entry in pos_ranked:
                    n = entry["name"].split()[0]
                    slug = entry["name"].lower().replace(" ", "-")
                    c = entry["count"]
                    is_top = entry["count"] == pos_ranked[0]["count"]
                    weight = "font-weight:700" if is_top else "opacity:0.8"
                    pos_html += f'<a href="#perfil-{slug}" class="fs-sm" style="{weight};text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{n} <b>({c}x)</b></a>'
                pos_html += '</div>'
                body_html += pos_html

            # -- Not targeted (safe) -- participou mas ninguém citou
            if not_targeted:
                safe_links = ", ".join(
                    f'<a href="#perfil-{n.lower().replace(" ", "-")}" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{n.split()[0]}</a>'
                    for n in not_targeted
                )
                safe_html = (
                    f'<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px 10px;align-items:center">'
                    f'<span class="fs-sm" style="opacity:0.6;min-width:80px">🛡️ Poupados</span>'
                    f'<span class="fs-sm" style="opacity:0.8">{safe_links}</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                )
                body_html += safe_html

            # -- Contradictions (neg sincerao + ❤️ queridometro)
            if contras:
                contra_html = '<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px 10px;align-items:center">'
                contra_html += f'<span class="fs-sm" style="opacity:0.6;min-width:80px">⚡ Contradiz</span>'
                for c in contras[:5]:
                    ator_slug = c["ator"].lower().replace(" ", "-")
                    alvo_slug = c["alvo"].lower().replace(" ", "-")
                    contra_html += (
                        f'<span class="fs-sm">'
                        f'<a href="#perfil-{ator_slug}" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{c["ator"].split()[0]}</a>'
                        f'→<a href="#perfil-{alvo_slug}" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{c["alvo"].split()[0]}</a> '
                        f'<span style="opacity:0.6">({c.get("tipo_label", "?")} mas dá {c.get("emoji", "?")})</span>'
                        f'</span>'
                    )
                if len(contras) > 5:
                    contra_html += f'<span class="fs-sm" style="opacity:0.5">+{len(contras)-5} mais</span>'
                contra_html += '</div>'
                body_html += contra_html

            # -- Aligned negative (confirmed hostility)
            if aligned_neg:
                align_html = '<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px 10px;align-items:center">'
                align_html += f'<span class="fs-sm" style="opacity:0.6;min-width:80px">🎯 Confirmado</span>'
                for a in aligned_neg[:5]:
                    ator_slug = a["ator"].lower().replace(" ", "-")
                    alvo_slug = a["alvo"].lower().replace(" ", "-")
                    align_html += (
                        f'<span class="fs-sm">'
                        f'<a href="#perfil-{ator_slug}" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{a["ator"].split()[0]}</a>'
                        f'→<a href="#perfil-{alvo_slug}" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{a["alvo"].split()[0]}</a> '
                        f'<span style="opacity:0.6">({a.get("tipo_label", "?")} + {a.get("emoji", "?")})</span>'
                        f'</span>'
                    )
                if len(aligned_neg) > 5:
                    align_html += f'<span class="fs-sm" style="opacity:0.5">+{len(aligned_neg)-5} mais</span>'
                align_html += '</div>'
                body_html += align_html

            body_html += '</div>'

            count_txt = f"{len(neg_ranked) + len(pos_ranked)}" if (neg_ranked or pos_ranked) else ""

            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), count_txt, source_tag="📸 Sincerão", subtitle=subtitle)}
{body_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 🗳️ Paredão ──
        elif ctype == "paredao":
            nominees = card.get("nominees", [])
            avatars_html = '<div class="u-s363">'
            for name in nominees:
                avatars_html += (
                    f'<div class="u-s057">'
                    f'{av(name, 60, "#e74c3c")}'
                    f'<span class="fs-xs u-s270">{name.split()[0]}</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                )
            avatars_html += '</div>'
            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), subtitle="Participantes emparedados — clique para análise de votos e reações.")}
{avatars_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 🎯 Impact Negative ──
        elif ctype == "impact":
            items = card.get("items", [])
            total = card.get("total", len(items))
            worst_neg = abs(items[0]["negative"]) if items else 1
            rows_html = '<div class="u-s058">'
            for it in items[:4]:
                name = it["name"]
                name_slug = name.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                neg = it["negative"]
                bar_pct = min(100, abs(neg) / worst_neg * 100)
                rows_html += (
                    f'<div class="u-s056">'
                    f'<a href="#perfil-{name_slug}" style="text-decoration:none">{av(name, 42, "#c0392b")}</a>'
                    f'<div class="u-s066">'
                    f'<div class="u-s059">'
                    f'<a href="#perfil-{name_slug}" class="fs-md u-s068" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{name.split()[0]}</a>'
                    f'<span class="text-neg fs-sm">{neg:.1f}</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'<div class="u-s014">'
                    f'<div style="width:{bar_pct:.0f}%;height:100%;background:#e74c3c;border-radius:3px;"></div>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'</div></div>'
                )
            extra = total - 4
            if extra > 0:
                rows_html += f'<div class="tc fs-sm u-s009"><a href="{card.get("link", "#")}" class="u-s035">+{extra} mais ↗</a></div>'
            rows_html += '</div>'
            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), f"{total}", source_tag="📈 Acumulado", subtitle="Impacto negativo acumulado por eventos de poder, votos, Sincerão e VIP. Quem mais sofre ao longo do jogo.")}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 🌟 Impact Positive ──
        elif ctype == "impact_positive":
            items = card.get("items", [])
            total = card.get("total", len(items))
            best_pos = items[0]["positive"] if items else 1
            rows_html = '<div class="u-s058">'
            for it in items[:4]:
                name = it["name"]
                name_slug = name.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                pos = it["positive"]
                bar_pct = min(100, pos / best_pos * 100) if best_pos > 0 else 0
                rows_html += (
                    f'<div class="u-s056">'
                    f'<a href="#perfil-{name_slug}" style="text-decoration:none">{av(name, 42, "#27ae60")}</a>'
                    f'<div class="u-s066">'
                    f'<div class="u-s059">'
                    f'<a href="#perfil-{name_slug}" class="fs-md u-s068" style="text-decoration:none;color:inherit">{name.split()[0]}</a>'
                    f'<span class="fs-sm" style="color:#27ae60;font-weight:700">+{pos:.1f}</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'<div class="u-s014">'
                    f'<div style="width:{bar_pct:.0f}%;height:100%;background:#27ae60;border-radius:3px;"></div>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'</div></div>'
                )
            extra = total - 4
            if extra > 0:
                rows_html += f'<div class="tc fs-sm u-s009"><a href="{card.get("link", "#")}" class="u-s035">+{extra} mais ↗</a></div>'
            rows_html += '</div>'
            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), f"{total}", source_tag="📈 Acumulado", subtitle="Impacto positivo acumulado por Liderança, Anjo, imunidades e Sincerão. Quem mais se beneficiou ao longo do jogo.")}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 🔴 Vulnerability ──
        elif ctype == "vulnerability":
            items = card.get("items", [])
            total = card.get("total", len(items))
            rows_html = '<div class="u-s058">'
            for it in items[:4]:
                name = it["name"]
                count = it["count"]
                level = it.get("level", "warning")
                enemies = it.get("enemies", [])
                level_color = "#e74c3c" if level == "critical" else "#f39c12"
                level_label = "MUITO VULNERÁVEL" if level == "critical" else "VULNERÁVEL"
                enemy_avatars = ''.join(av(e, 34, level_color) for e in enemies[:4])
                extra_enemies = len(enemies) - 4
                rows_html += (
                    f'<div class="u-s348">'
                    f'{av(name, 42, level_color)}'
                    f'<div class="u-s066">'
                    f'<div class="u-s347">'
                    f'<span class="fs-base u-s068">{name.split()[0]}</span>'
                    f'<span class="fs-2xs" style="padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;background:{level_color};color:#fff;font-weight:700;">{level_label}</span>'
                    f'<span class="fs-sm" style="color:{level_color};font-weight:600;">{count} falsos amigos</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'<div class="u-s366">'
                    f'<span class="fs-2xs u-s251">Quem:</span>'
                    f'{enemy_avatars}'
                    f'{f"<span class=&quot;fs-2xs&quot; style=&quot;color:#888;&quot;>+{extra_enemies}</span>" if extra_enemies > 0 else ""}'
                    f'</div></div></div>'
                )
            extra = total - 4
            if extra > 0:
                rows_html += f'<div class="tc fs-sm u-s009"><a href="{card.get("link", "#")}" class="u-s035">+{extra} mais ↗</a></div>'
            rows_html += '</div>'
            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), f"{total}", source_tag="📈 Composto", subtitle="Falsos amigos: dá ❤️ a quem tem score negativo contra si (queridômetro + votos + eventos). Risco de voto surpresa.")}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 💔 Streak Breaks ──
        elif ctype == "breaks":
            items = card.get("items", [])
            total = card.get("total", len(items))
            strong_count = card.get("strong_count", 0)
            severity_badge = f"{strong_count} graves" if strong_count else None

            rows_html = '<div class="u-s357">'
            for it in items[:4]:
                g = it["giver"]
                r = it["receiver"]
                g_slug = g.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                r_slug = r.lower().replace(" ", "-")
                streak = it["streak"]
                new_e = it.get("new_emoji", "?")
                sev = it.get("severity", "mild")
                sev_border = "#e74c3c" if sev == "strong" else "#8e44ad"
                date_str = it.get("date", "")
                try:
                    date_fmt = datetime.strptime(date_str, "%Y-%m-%d").strftime("%d/%m")
                except Exception:
                    date_fmt = ""
                date_badge = f'<span class="fs-2xs" style="opacity:0.5;margin-left:auto">{date_fmt}</span>' if date_fmt else ""
                alert_html = '<span class="fs-xs" style="color:#e74c3c;font-weight:700">🚨</span>' if sev == "strong" else ""
                rows_html += (
                    f'<div class="u-s342" style="border-left:3px solid {sev_border};">'
                    f'<a href="#perfil-{g_slug}" style="text-decoration:none">{av(g, 42, sev_border)}</a>'
                    f'<div class="u-s057">'
                    f'<span class="fs-xs u-s001">{streak}d ❤️</span>'
                    f'<span class="fs-base">→ {new_e}</span>'
                    f'</div>'
                    f'<a href="#perfil-{r_slug}" style="text-decoration:none">{av(r, 42, sev_border)}</a>'
                    f'{alert_html}'
                    f'{date_badge}'
                    f'</div>'
                )
            extra = total - 4
            if extra > 0:
                rows_html += f'<a href="{card.get("link", "#")}" class="fs-sm u-s350">+{extra} mais ↗</a>'
            rows_html += '</div>'

            print(f'''<div class="info-panel" style="border-left-color:{color};">
{card_header(card["icon"], card["title"], card.get("link"), severity_badge or f"{total}", source_tag="📈 Histórico", subtitle="Alianças longas de ❤️ que foram rompidas. Quanto mais dias seguidos, mais grave a ruptura.")}
{rows_html}
</div>''')

        # ── 📅 Context — rendered in the header, not as a card ──
        elif ctype == "context":
            pass  # handled above in section header

    # ── 💰 Saldo de Estalecas (always last card, from profiles data) ──
    saldo_profiles = sorted(
        [p for p in index_data.get("profiles", []) if p.get("active", True)],
        key=lambda x: x.get("balance", 0), reverse=True
    )
    if saldo_profiles:
        top_n = min(5, len(saldo_profiles))
        max_bal = max(abs(p.get("balance", 0)) for p in saldo_profiles) or 1
        saldo_rows = '<div class="u-s355">'
        medals = ["🥇", "🥈", "🥉", "4º", "5º"]
        for i, p in enumerate(saldo_profiles[:top_n]):
            name = p["name"]
            bal = p.get("balance", 0)
            grupo = p.get("group", "")
            cor = GROUP_COLORS.get(grupo, "#999")
            bal_color = "#1a9850" if bal > 1000 else ("#66bd63" if bal > 0 else ("#888" if bal == 0 else "#e74c3c"))
            label = medals[i] if i < len(medals) else f"{i+1}º"
            bar_pct = min(100, abs(bal) / max_bal * 100) if max_bal > 0 else 0
            saldo_rows += (
                f'<div class="u-s056">'
                f'{av(name, 42, cor)}'
                f'<div class="u-s066">'
                f'<div class="u-s059">'
                f'<span class="fs-md u-s068">{label} {name.split()[0]}</span>'
                f'<span class="fs-base" style="color:{bal_color};font-weight:700;">{bal:,}</span>'
                f'</div>'
                f'<div class="u-s014">'
                f'<div style="width:{bar_pct:.0f}%;height:100%;background:{bal_color};border-radius:3px;"></div>'
                f'</div>'
                f'</div></div>'
            )
        saldo_rows += '</div>'
        print(f'''<div class="info-panel u-s199">
{card_header("💰", "Saldo de Estalecas", "evolucao.html#saldo", source_tag="📸 Dado do dia", subtitle="Ranking dos participantes com mais estalecas. Moeda do jogo usada em compras e dinâmicas de poder.")}
{saldo_rows}
</div>''')

    print('</div>')  # close grid
```

```{python}
#| label: paredao-status-card
#| output: asis

paredao_names = index_data.get("paredao", {}).get("names", [])
if paredao_names:
    status_text = "Em Votação"
    status_color = "#e74c3c"
    status_icon = "🗳️"
    names_display = ", ".join(sorted(paredao_names))
    detail_html = f'<div class="fs-lg u-s022">Emparedados: <strong>{names_display}</strong></div>'
else:
    status_text = "Aguardando formação"
    status_color = "#6c757d"
    status_icon = "⏳"
    detail_html = '<div class="fs-base u-s020">Nenhum paredão ativo no momento</div>'

print(f'''
<div class="info-panel" style="padding: 1rem 1.2rem; margin: 1rem 0 1.5rem 0; border-left-color: {status_color}; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem;">
<div>
<div class="fs-xl u-s385">
{status_icon} Paredão: <span style="color: {status_color};">{status_text}</span>
</div>
{detail_html}
<div class="fs-base u-s217">
<a href="paredao.html" class="u-s027">Paredão atual</a> · <a href="paredoes.html" class="u-s027">Arquivo de paredões</a>
</div>
</div>
<a href="paredao.html" class="fs-base" style="background: {status_color}; color: #fff; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap;">
Ver análise →
</a>
</div>
''')
```

# Rankings {#ranking-sentimento}

<style>
.ranking-mobile-summary,
.ranking-mobile-cta {
  display: none;
}

.ranking-mobile-summary {
  margin: 0.6rem 0 0.9rem;
}

.ranking-mobile-card {
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 0.75rem 0.8rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.65rem;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
}

.ranking-mobile-card h4 {
  margin: 0 0 0.45rem 0;
  font-size: var(--fs-lg);
  color: #fff;
}

.ranking-mobile-card ul {
  margin: 0.25rem 0 0;
  padding-left: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
}

.ranking-mobile-card li {
  margin: 0.16rem 0;
  color: #d0d0d0;
  font-size: var(--fs-sm);
}

.ranking-mobile-kpis {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 0.4rem;
}

.ranking-mobile-kpi {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 0.35rem 0.25rem;
  text-align: center;
}

.ranking-mobile-kpi .v {
  display: block;
  font-size: var(--fs-xl);
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #fff;
  line-height: 1.1;
}

.ranking-mobile-kpi .l {
  display: block;
  font-size: var(--fs-2xs);
  color: #9aa0a6;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}

.ranking-mobile-note {
  color: #9aa0a6;
  font-size: var(--fs-xs);
  line-height: 1.3;
}

@media (max-width: 575.98px) {
  #cell-sentiment-ranking-today,
  #cell-evolution-queridometro,
  #cell-evolution-strategic {
    display: none;
  }

  #tabset-1-1 > div:not(.ranking-mobile-summary),
  #tabset-1-2 > div:not(.ranking-mobile-summary),
  #tabset-2-2 > div:not(.ranking-mobile-summary),
  #tabset-1-1 > p.text-muted.small,
  #tabset-1-2 > p.text-muted.small {
    display: none !important;
  }

  .ranking-desktop-only {
    display: none !important;
  }

  .ranking-mobile-summary,
  .ranking-mobile-cta {
    display: block;
  }
}
</style>

```{python}
#| label: composite-score-desc
#| output: asis
print(ANALYSIS_DESCRIPTIONS["composite_score_chart"])
```

```{python}
#| label: ranking-prep
#| include: false

ranking_data = index_data.get("ranking", {})
_ranking_height = ranking_data.get("height", 500)
today_rows = ranking_data.get("today", [])


def _short_name(name):
    return (name or "?").split()[0]


def _fmt_signed(value, decimals=1):
    return f"{value:+.{decimals}f}"


def _render_list(rows, empty_text, value_fmt):
    if not rows:
        return f"<p class='ranking-mobile-note'>{empty_text}</p>"
    items = []
    for row in rows:
        nm = _short_name(row["name"])
        items.append(f"<li><strong>{nm}</strong>: {value_fmt(row)}</li>")
    return "<ul>" + "".join(items) + "</ul>"


def render_mobile_queridometro_summary(today_rows, change_week):
    if not today_rows:
        return "<div class='ranking-mobile-summary'><p class='ranking-mobile-note'>Sem dados de ranking.</p></div>"

    df = pd.DataFrame(today_rows).copy()
    df["score"] = pd.to_numeric(df.get("score", 0), errors="coerce").fillna(0.0)
    df["hearts"] = pd.to_numeric(df.get("hearts", 0), errors="coerce").fillna(0.0)
    df["negative"] = pd.to_numeric(df.get("negative", 0), errors="coerce").fillna(0.0)
    df["touch"] = df["hearts"] + df["negative"]
    df["neg_ratio"] = np.where(df["touch"] > 0, df["negative"] / df["touch"], 0.0)

    kpi_blindados = int((df["score"] >= 4).sum())
    kpi_neutros = int(((df["score"] >= -1) & (df["score"] <= 1)).sum())
    kpi_alerta = int((df["score"] <= -2).sum())

    pressure = (df[df["touch"] >= 8]
                .sort_values(["neg_ratio", "negative"], ascending=[False, False])
                .head(3))
    pressure_rows = [{
        "name": r["name"],
        "neg_ratio": r["neg_ratio"],
        "negative": r["negative"],
        "hearts": r["hearts"],
    } for _, r in pressure.iterrows()]

    week_up = sorted(
        [r for r in change_week if r.get("delta", 0) > 0],
        key=lambda x: x.get("delta", 0),
        reverse=True
    )[:2]
    week_down = sorted(
        [r for r in change_week if r.get("delta", 0) < 0],
        key=lambda x: x.get("delta", 0)
    )[:2]

    week_up_html = _render_list(
        week_up,
        "Sem subidas relevantes na semana.",
        lambda r: f"<span class='u-s054'>{_fmt_signed(r.get('delta', 0), 1)} pts</span>"
    )
    week_down_html = _render_list(
        week_down,
        "Sem quedas relevantes na semana.",
        lambda r: f"<span class='u-s005'>{_fmt_signed(r.get('delta', 0), 1)} pts</span>"
    )

    pressure_html = _render_list(
        pressure_rows,
        "Sem pressão de rejeição acima da média hoje.",
        lambda r: f"{(r['neg_ratio'] * 100):.0f}% negativas ({int(r['negative'])} neg / {int(r['hearts'])} ❤️)"
    )

    return (
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-summary">\n'
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-card">\n'
        '<h4>📱 Radar rápido (hoje)</h4>\n'
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-kpis">\n'
        f'<div class="ranking-mobile-kpi"><span class="v">{kpi_blindados}</span><span class="l">blindados (≥4)</span></div>\n'
        f'<div class="ranking-mobile-kpi"><span class="v">{kpi_neutros}</span><span class="l">zona cinza</span></div>\n'
        f'<div class="ranking-mobile-kpi"><span class="v">{kpi_alerta}</span><span class="l">alerta (≤-2)</span></div>\n'
        '</div>\n'
        '<p class="ranking-mobile-note u-s013">Resumo diferente do card do topo: foco em risco e concentração, não em pódio.</p>\n'
        '</div>\n'
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-card">\n'
        '<h4>🗓️ Viradas da semana</h4>\n'
        '<p class="ranking-mobile-note u-s011">Maior alta</p>\n'
        f'{week_up_html}\n'
        '<p class="ranking-mobile-note u-s089">Maior queda</p>\n'
        f'{week_down_html}\n'
        '</div>\n'
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-card">\n'
        '<h4>🔥 Pressão de rejeição</h4>\n'
        f'{pressure_html}\n'
        '</div>\n'
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-cta ranking-mobile-note">\n'
        'Gráfico completo no desktop ou na página dedicada:\n'
        '<a href="evolucao.html#sentimento" class="u-s059">ver evolução do queridômetro ↗</a>\n'
        '</div>\n'
        '</div>'
    )


def _recent_swings(data_rows, score_key, lookback_days=7):
    if not data_rows:
        return [], [], None, None

    df = pd.DataFrame(data_rows).copy()
    if df.empty or "name" not in df.columns or "date" not in df.columns or score_key not in df.columns:
        return [], [], None, None

    df["date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["date"], errors="coerce")
    df = df.dropna(subset=["date"]).sort_values("date")
    if df.empty:
        return [], [], None, None

    unique_dates = sorted(df["date"].drop_duplicates())
    if len(unique_dates) < 2:
        return [], [], None, None

    start_idx = max(0, len(unique_dates) - 1 - lookback_days)
    start_date = unique_dates[start_idx]
    end_date = unique_dates[-1]

    window = df[df["date"] >= start_date].copy()
    first_vals = window.groupby("name")[score_key].first()
    last_vals = window.groupby("name")[score_key].last()
    deltas = (last_vals - first_vals).dropna()
    if deltas.empty:
        return [], [], start_date, end_date

    top_up = deltas.sort_values(ascending=False).head(3)
    top_down = deltas.sort_values().head(3)

    up_rows = [{
        "name": n,
        "delta": float(v),
        "current": float(last_vals.get(n, np.nan)),
    } for n, v in top_up.items()]
    down_rows = [{
        "name": n,
        "delta": float(v),
        "current": float(last_vals.get(n, np.nan)),
    } for n, v in top_down.items()]

    return up_rows, down_rows, start_date, end_date


def render_mobile_evolution_summary(data_rows, score_key, section_title, cta_href, score_decimals=1):
    up_rows, down_rows, start_date, end_date = _recent_swings(data_rows, score_key, lookback_days=7)
    if start_date is None or end_date is None:
        return (
            "<div class='ranking-mobile-summary'>"
            "<p class='ranking-mobile-note'>Sem série temporal suficiente para resumo móvel.</p>"
            "</div>"
        )

    date_window = f"{start_date.strftime('%d/%m')} → {end_date.strftime('%d/%m')}"
    delta_fmt = lambda r: (
        f"<span style='color:{'#27ae60' if r['delta'] >= 0 else '#e74c3c'};'>"
        f"{_fmt_signed(r['delta'], score_decimals)}</span>"
        f" (agora {r['current']:+.{score_decimals}f})"
    )

    up_html = _render_list(up_rows[:2], "Sem altas relevantes no período.", delta_fmt)
    down_html = _render_list(down_rows[:2], "Sem quedas relevantes no período.", delta_fmt)

    return (
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-summary">\n'
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-card">\n'
        f'<h4>📈 {section_title} — últimos 7 dias</h4>\n'
        f'<p class="ranking-mobile-note u-s011">Janela: {date_window}</p>\n'
        '<p class="ranking-mobile-note u-s439">Subidas</p>\n'
        f'{up_html}\n'
        '<p class="ranking-mobile-note u-s089">Quedas</p>\n'
        f'{down_html}\n'
        '</div>\n'
        '<div class="ranking-mobile-cta ranking-mobile-note">\n'
        'Série completa:\n'
        f'<a href="{cta_href}" class="u-s059">abrir gráficos detalhados ↗</a>\n'
        '</div>\n'
        '</div>'
    )
```

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Queridômetro

```{python}
#| label: ranking-mobile-summary-queridometro
#| output: asis

print(render_mobile_queridometro_summary(today_rows, ranking_data.get("change_week", [])))
```

```{python}
#| label: sentiment-ranking-today

fig = make_sentiment_ranking(today_rows, title_suffix=latest.get("label", ""), fixed_height=_ranking_height)
fig.show()
```

## Evolução

```{python}
#| label: evolution-shared
#| include: false

# Shared setup for evolution charts
_paredoes_markers = []
_paredoes_json = load_paredoes_raw()
if _paredoes_json.get('paredoes'):
    for _p in _paredoes_json['paredoes']:
        _paredoes_markers.append({
            'date': pd.to_datetime(_p['data']),
            'label': f"🗳️ {_p['numero']}º Paredão",
        })

# Consistent color palette across both charts
_all_participants = sorted(set(
    row["name"] for row in index_data.get("timeline", [])
))
_palette = (
    px.colors.qualitative.Plotly + px.colors.qualitative.D3 +
    px.colors.qualitative.Set2 + px.colors.qualitative.Bold
)
_part_colors = {name: _palette[i % len(_palette)] for i, name in enumerate(_all_participants)}


def make_evolution_chart(data_rows, score_key, title, y_label, score_fmt="+.1f"):
    """Build an evolution chart with rank annotations and paredão markers."""
    if not data_rows:
        return None

    df = pd.DataFrame([{
        "Data": pd.to_datetime(row["date"]),
        "Participante": row["name"],
        "Score": row[score_key],
        "Grupo": row.get("group", "?"),
        "Rank": row.get("rank"),
    } for row in data_rows])

    if df.empty or len(df['Data'].unique()) < 2:
        return None

    all_parts = sorted(df['Participante'].unique())

    # Find biggest movers: participants with largest score change from first to last appearance
    first_scores = df.sort_values('Data').groupby('Participante')['Score'].first()
    last_scores = df.sort_values('Data').groupby('Participante')['Score'].last()
    deltas = (last_scores - first_scores).dropna()

    top5 = set(last_scores.nlargest(5).index)
    bottom5 = set(last_scores.nsmallest(5).index)
    movers = set(deltas.abs().nlargest(5).index)
    highlight = top5 | bottom5

    fig = go.Figure()

    for name in all_parts:
        df_p = df[df['Participante'] == name].sort_values('Data')
        is_hl = name in highlight
        is_mover = name in movers

        # Use precomputed rank from data
        ranks = df_p['Rank'].tolist() if 'Rank' in df_p.columns else [None] * len(df_p)

        hover_text = [
            f"{name}: {s:{score_fmt}} (#{r})" if r else f"{name}: {s:{score_fmt}}"
            for s, r in zip(df_p['Score'], ranks)
        ]

        fig.add_trace(go.Scatter(
            x=df_p['Data'], y=df_p['Score'],
            mode='lines+markers',
            name=f"{'📈 ' if is_mover and name in movers - highlight else ''}{name}",
            line=dict(
                width=3 if is_hl else 1.5,
                color=_part_colors.get(name, '#999'),
            ),
            marker=dict(size=6 if is_hl else 3),
            hovertext=hover_text,
            hoverinfo='text',
            visible=True if is_hl else 'legendonly',
        ))

    # Rank annotations at last date for visible traces
    last_date = df['Data'].max()
    last_df = df[df['Data'] == last_date].copy()
    if 'Rank' not in last_df.columns or last_df['Rank'].isna().all():
        last_df['Rank'] = last_df['Score'].rank(ascending=False, method='min').astype(int)
    for _, row in last_df.iterrows():
        if row['Participante'] in highlight:
            fig.add_annotation(
                x=last_date, y=row['Score'],
                text=f"#{int(row['Rank'])}",
                showarrow=False,
                font=dict(size=9, color='#aaa'),
                xshift=28,
            )

    # Zero line
    fig.add_shape(type='line',
                  x0=df['Data'].min(), x1=df['Data'].max(),
                  y0=0, y1=0,
                  line=dict(color='red', dash='dash', width=1))

    # Paredão markers
    y_min = df['Score'].min()
    y_max = df['Score'].max()
    y_range = [y_min - abs(y_max - y_min) * 0.1, y_max + abs(y_max - y_min) * 0.1]
    for marker in _paredoes_markers:
        if df['Data'].min() <= marker['date'] <= df['Data'].max():
            fig.add_shape(
                type='line', x0=marker['date'], x1=marker['date'],
                y0=y_range[0], y1=y_range[1],
                line=dict(color='#FF6B6B', dash='dot', width=1.5),
            )
            fig.add_annotation(
                x=marker['date'], y=y_range[1],
                text=marker['label'],
                showarrow=False,
                font=dict(size=10, color='#FF6B6B'),
                yshift=10,
            )

    fig.update_layout(
        title=title,
        xaxis_title="Data",
        yaxis_title=y_label,
        height=max(550, len(all_parts) * 20),
        hovermode='x',
        legend=dict(
            font=dict(size=10),
            itemsizing='constant',
            bgcolor='rgba(0,0,0,0.5)',
        ),
        margin=dict(r=200),
    )

    # Add updatemenus for quick presets
    n_traces = len(all_parts)
    fig.update_layout(
        updatemenus=[dict(
            type='buttons',
            direction='right',
            x=0.0, y=1.12,
            xanchor='left', yanchor='top',
            bgcolor='rgba(50,50,50,0.8)',
            font=dict(color='#ccc', size=10),
            buttons=[
                dict(label='Top 5 + Bottom 5',
                     method='update',
                     args=[{'visible': [
                         True if name in highlight else 'legendonly'
                         for name in all_parts
                     ] + [True] * (len(fig.data) - n_traces)}]),
                dict(label='Maiores Mudanças',
                     method='update',
                     args=[{'visible': [
                         True if name in movers else 'legendonly'
                         for name in all_parts
                     ] + [True] * (len(fig.data) - n_traces)}]),
                dict(label='Todos',
                     method='update',
                     args=[{'visible': [True] * len(fig.data)}]),
            ],
        )]
    )

    return fig
```

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Queridômetro

```{python}
#| label: evolution-queridometro
#| output: asis

timeline_data = index_data.get("timeline", [])
print(render_mobile_evolution_summary(
    timeline_data,
    score_key="sentiment",
    section_title="Evolução do queridômetro",
    cta_href="evolucao.html#sentimento",
    score_decimals=1,
))
fig_evo_q = make_evolution_chart(
    timeline_data, "sentiment",
    title="Evolução do Queridômetro",
    y_label="Score de Sentimento (soma reações)",
    score_fmt="+.1f",
)
if fig_evo_q:
    fig_evo_q.show()
    print("<p class='text-muted small u-s038'>Score = soma ponderada de reações recebidas (❤️ +1, leves −0.5, fortes −1). Use os botões acima para alternar entre presets.</p>")
else:
    print("<p class='text-muted'>Dados insuficientes para gráfico de evolução.</p>")
```

### Estratégico

```{python}
#| label: evolution-strategic
#| output: asis

strat_timeline_data = index_data.get("strategic_timeline", [])
print(render_mobile_evolution_summary(
    strat_timeline_data,
    score_key="score",
    section_title="Evolução estratégica",
    cta_href="evolucao.html#estrategico",
    score_decimals=2,
))
fig_evo_s = make_evolution_chart(
    strat_timeline_data, "score",
    title="Evolução do Score Estratégico",
    y_label="Score Composto (média recebida)",
    score_fmt="+.3f",
)
if fig_evo_s:
    fig_evo_s.show()
    print(f"<p class='text-muted small u-s038'>{ANALYSIS_DESCRIPTIONS['strategic_evolution_caption']}</p>")
else:
    print("<p class='text-muted'>Dados de relações não disponíveis para evolução estratégica.</p>")
```

:::

:::

# Tabela Cruzada de Reações {#crosstable}

<p class="text-muted small">📸 <strong>Dado do dia</strong> — mostra apenas a coleta mais recente.</p>

Quem deu qual reação para quem. Cada célula mostra a reação que a **linha** (emissor) deu para a **coluna** (receptor).

```{python}
#| label: cross-table
#| output: asis

cross_data = index_data.get("cross_table", {})
print(make_cross_table_html(cross_data, title_suffix=latest.get("label", "")))
```

```{python}
#| label: cross-table-summary
#| output: asis

print("\n### Reações Recebidas por Participante\n")
print("<p class='text-muted small'>Ordenado por score de sentimento. Células coloridas indicam valores altos.</p>")
summary_data = index_data.get("reaction_summary", {})
print(make_reaction_summary_html(summary_data, collapsed_rows=5))
```

# Perfis Individuais {#perfis}

```{python}
#| label: profiles-intro-desc
#| output: asis
print(ANALYSIS_DESCRIPTIONS["profiles_intro"])
```

<details class="u-s433">
<summary class="info-panel u-s296">
ℹ️ Como calculamos Vulnerabilidade, Impacto Negativo e Hostilidade Gerada (clique para expandir)
</summary>
<div class="info-panel u-s456">

**🎯 Vulnerabilidade a Votos Surpresa**

```{python}
#| label: vulnerability-desc
#| output: asis
print(ANALYSIS_DESCRIPTIONS["vulnerability_long"])
```

| Badge | Critério | Significado |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| 🔴 **MUITO VULNERÁVEL** | 5+ falsos amigos | Posição crítica. Muitas pessoas que considera amigas podem votar contra sem que espere. |
| 🟠 **VULNERÁVEL** | 3-4 falsos amigos | Posição frágil. Alguns "amigos" são hostis e podem surpreender em votação. |
| 🟡 **ATENÇÃO** | 1-2 falsos amigos | Posição razoável, mas com pontos cegos. |
| 🟢 **PROTEGIDO** | 0 falsos amigos | Sem pontos cegos — sabe quem são seus aliados e inimigos. |

**🧭 Impacto Negativo (acumulado)**

Mede o quanto o participante foi alvo de eventos negativos ao longo do jogo: indicações, contragolpes, votos recebidos, Sincerão negativo, visibilidade de votos, e backlash. Usa os mesmos pesos calibrados do sistema de relações (`relations_scores.json` → `received_impact.negative`), sem decay — todos os eventos acumulam com peso integral.

Faixas: 🟢 **NENHUM** (0), 🟡 **BAIXO** (< 0), 🟠 **MÉDIO** (≤ -5), 🔴 **ALTO** (≤ -10).

**🔥 Hostilidade Gerada (acumulada)**

Mede o quanto o participante **causou impacto negativo** sobre os demais: soma das edges negativas de eventos de poder, votos, Sincerão e visibilidade. Usa os mesmos pesos calibrados do sistema de relações (`pairs_daily` → componentes não-queridômetro), sem decay.

Faixas: 🟢 **NENHUMA** (0), 🟡 **BAIXA** (< 0), 🟠 **MÉDIA** (≤ -4), 🔴 **ALTA** (≤ -8).

**Categorias de Relação** (baseadas no score composto, não apenas emoji):

- **✅ Aliados** — Score positivo mútuo. Nos 2 paredões, 0% dos aliados votaram contra. Votos seguros.
- **⚔️ Inimigos** — Score negativo mútuo. Votos contra esperados de ambos os lados.
- **⚠️ Falsos Amigos** — Seu score é positivo (confia), mas o deles é negativo (hostil). **PERIGO:** votam contra 2-3× mais que não-falsos amigos.
- **🗡️ Alvos Ocultos** — Seu score é negativo (hostil), mas eles confiam em você. Eles não sabem que são seus alvos.

```{python}
#| label: profiles-footer-desc
#| output: asis
print(ANALYSIS_DESCRIPTIONS["profiles_footer"])
```

**Sinais de jogo no perfil:**
- **Poderes recebidos** (benefícios e prejuízos): acontecimentos na casa que afetam o score.
- **Votos da casa recebidos**: marcados com dedo-duro quando o voto foi revelado.
- **Impacto Negativo** e **Hostilidade Gerada**: pesos calibrados do sistema de relações (sem divergência).

</div>
</details>

```{python}
#| label: individual-profiles
#| output: asis

from IPython.display import display, HTML as IPyHTML

profiles = index_data.get("profiles", [])

source_icons = {
    'big fone': '📞',
    'caixas-surpresa': '🎁',
    'prova do líder': '👑',
    'prova do anjo': '😇',
    'castigo do monstro': '👹',
    'dinâmica da casa': '🎬',
}

print("""
<style>
/* ═══ Profile Card ═══ */
.profile-card {
    background: #2a2a2a;
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

/* Hero header */
.profile-hero-inner {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 1rem;
    padding: 1rem;
}
.profile-hero-inner .stat-row {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    position: relative;
    margin-top: 0.4rem;
    align-items: center;
}

/* Status strip */
.profile-status-strip {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    padding: 0.6rem 1rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #444;
    background: #333;
}

/* Status detail (tappable <details>) */
.status-detail {
    flex: 1;
    min-width: 140px;
}
.status-detail summary {
    cursor: pointer;
    list-style: none;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.4rem;
    padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem;
    border-radius: 8px;
}
.status-detail summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
.status-detail[open] .status-breakdown {
    padding: 0.5rem 0.8rem;
    font-size: var(--fs-sm);
}
.status-breakdown .sb-row {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 0.6rem;
    padding: 0.15rem 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #333;
}
.status-breakdown .sb-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.status-breakdown .sb-muted { color: #999; font-size: var(--fs-xs); margin-top: 0.3rem; }

/* Reactions grid */
.profile-reactions-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 0.8rem;
    padding: 0.8rem 1rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #444;
    background: #333;
}
.rxn-chip {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 0.25rem;
    background: #2f2f2f;
    padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: var(--fs-md);
    color: #ddd;
}

.rxn-detail summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
.stat-row details { position: relative; display: inline; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
.stat-row details > summary.rxn-chip {
    list-style: none;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0.2rem 0.5rem;
    font-size: var(--fs-md);
    line-height: 1.4;
}
.stat-row details > summary.rxn-chip::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
.stat-row details > summary.rxn-chip::marker { display: none; content: ""; }
.stat-row .rxn-chip { line-height: 1.4; font-size: var(--fs-md); }
.rxn-detail[open] summary .rxn-hint { display: none; }

/* Relations grid */
.profile-relations {
    padding: 0.8rem 1rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #444;
}
.relation-section {
    margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
    padding: 0.5rem;
    border-radius: 6px;
}
.relation-section:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
.relation-label {
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: var(--fs-md);
    margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
}
.avatar-row {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 8px;
    align-items: flex-start;
}

/* Game dynamics (collapsible) */
.game-dynamics-detail summary {
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #fff;
    font-size: var(--fs-base);
    padding: 0.6rem 0;
    list-style: none;
}
.game-dynamics-detail summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
.game-dynamics-detail summary::before {
    content: '▶ ';
    font-size: var(--fs-xs);
    color: #888;
}
.game-dynamics-detail[open] summary::before {
    content: '▼ ';
}

/* Curiosities */
.curiosity-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    padding: 0.3rem 0;
    font-size: var(--fs-base);
    color: #ccc;
}
.curiosity-icon { font-size: var(--fs-lg); flex-shrink: 0; }

/* Mobile responsive */
@media (max-width: 600px) {
    .profile-hero-inner {
        flex-direction: column;
        text-align: center;
    }
    .profile-hero-inner .stat-row {
        justify-content: center;
    }
    .profile-status-strip {
        flex-direction: column;
    }
    .profile-status-strip .status-detail {
        min-width: 100%;
    }
    .profile-reactions-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
    }
}
</style>
""")

def plant_color(score):
    if score >= 80:
        return "#2f7d46"
    if score >= 60:
        return "#6c8a3c"
    if score >= 40:
        return "#b9772a"
    return "#a94442"

def render_actor_avatars(actors, border_color="#666", color_lookup=None, size=24, skip_icons=None):
    if not actors:
        return ''
    parts = []
    for a in actors:
        color = border_color
        if color_lookup and a in color_lookup:
            color = color_lookup[a]
        if a in AVATARS and AVATARS[a]:
            parts.append(
                f'<img src="{AVATARS[a]}" style="width:{size}px;height:{size}px;border-radius:50%;'
                f'border:1.5px solid {color};object-fit:cover;margin-right:-3px;">'
            )
        else:
            icon = None
            lower = a.lower() if isinstance(a, str) else ''
            for k, v in source_icons.items():
                if k in lower:
                    icon = v
                    break
            if "dinâmica da casa" in lower:
                continue
            if icon and skip_icons and icon in skip_icons:
                continue
            parts.append(f'<span class="fs-base">{icon or "🎬"}</span>')
    return ''.join(parts)


def make_event_chips(events, border_color, color_lookup=None):
    if not events:
        return "<span class='u-s058'>—</span>"
    chips = []
    for ev in events:
        emoji = ev.get("emoji", "•")
        label = ev.get("label", ev.get("type"))
        count = ev.get("count", 1)
        actors = ev.get("actors", [])
        count_prefix = f"{count}x " if count > 1 else ""
        chip_border = border_color
        actor_html = render_actor_avatars(
            actors,
            chip_border,
            color_lookup=color_lookup,
            size=20,
            skip_icons={emoji} if emoji else None,
        )
        actor_label = " + ".join(actors) if actors else ""
        title = f"{label} — {actor_label}" if actor_label else label
        chips.append(
            f"<span style='display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.25rem; background:#2f2f2f; "
            f"border:1px solid {chip_border}; color:#ddd; border-radius:8px; padding:0.2rem 0.5rem; "
            f"margin:0.1rem; line-height:1.4;' title='{title}' class='fs-md'>"
            f"{count_prefix}{emoji} {label} {actor_html}</span>"
        )
    return ' '.join(chips)


def render_status_chip(emoji, label, level, color, detail_html=""):
    """Tappable status indicator with optional breakdown."""
    r, g, b = int(color[1:3], 16), int(color[3:5], 16), int(color[5:7], 16)
    bg = f"rgba({r},{g},{b},0.12)"
    if detail_html:
        return (
            f'<details class="status-detail">'
            f'<summary style="background:{bg};border-left:3px solid {color};">'
            f'<span class="fs-lg">{emoji}</span>'
            f'<div><div class="fs-sm" style="font-weight:700;color:{color};">{level}</div>'
            f'<div class="fs-2xs u-s061">{label}</div></div>'
            f'</summary>'
            f'<div class="status-breakdown u-s001">{detail_html}</div>'
            f'</details>'
        )
    return (
        f'<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4rem;background:{bg};'
        f'padding:0.4rem 0.8rem;border-radius:8px;border-left:3px solid {color};flex:1;min-width:140px;">'
        f'<span class="fs-lg">{emoji}</span>'
        f'<div><div class="fs-sm" style="font-weight:700;color:{color};">{level}</div>'
        f'<div class="fs-2xs u-s061">{label}</div></div>'
        f'</div>'
    )

def render_avatar_row(items, border_color, max_show=999):
    """Row of avatars with name + score under each. Shows ALL by default."""
    if not items:
        return '<span class="fs-md u-s058">—</span>'
    html = '<div class="avatar-row">'
    for item in items:
        if isinstance(item, str):
            n = item
            score_html = ""
        else:
            n = item.get("name", "")
            # Show "their_score" (what they think of me) as the primary displayed score
            ts = item.get("their_score")
            ms = item.get("my_score")
            if ts is not None:
                sc_color = "#28a745" if ts >= 0 else "#dc3545"
                score_html = f'<div class="fs-2xs" style="color:{sc_color};font-weight:600;">{ts:+.1f}</div>'
            elif ms is not None:
                sc_color = "#28a745" if ms >= 0 else "#dc3545"
                score_html = f'<div class="fs-2xs" style="color:{sc_color};font-weight:600;">{ms:+.1f}</div>'
            else:
                score_html = ""
        first_name = n.split()[0] if n else ""
        html += (
            f'<div class="u-s352">'
            f'{av(n, 48, border_color)}'
            f'<div class="fs-2xs u-s266">{first_name}</div>'
            f'{score_html}'
            f'</div>'
        )
    html += '</div>'
    return html


COMP_LABELS = {
    "power_event": "Eventos de poder",
    "sincerao": "Sincerão",
    "vote": "Votos",
    "vip": "VIP",
    "anjo": "Anjo",
    "visibility": "Visibilidade",
}

for p in profiles:
    name = p.get('name')
    member_of = p.get('member_of', '?')
    group = p.get('group', '?')
    balance = p.get('balance', 0)
    roles = p.get('roles', [])
    score = p.get('score', 0)

    rel = p.get("relations", {})
    allies = rel.get("allies", [])
    enemies = rel.get("enemies", [])
    false_friends = rel.get("false_friends", [])
    blind_targets = rel.get("blind_targets", [])

    n_allies = len(allies)
    n_enemies = len(enemies)
    n_false_friends = len(false_friends)

    ally_names = {a["name"] for a in allies}
    enemy_names = {n["name"] for n in enemies}
    false_friend_names = {n["name"] for n in false_friends}
    blind_names = {n["name"] for n in blind_targets}

    relation_colors = {}
    relation_colors.update({n: "#28a745" for n in ally_names})
    relation_colors.update({n: "#dc3545" for n in enemy_names})
    relation_colors.update({n: "#ffc107" for n in false_friend_names})
    relation_colors.update({n: "#6f42c1" for n in blind_names})

    events = p.get("events", {})
    pos_html = make_event_chips(events.get("pos_week", []), "#28a745", relation_colors)
    neg_html = make_event_chips(events.get("neg_week", []), "#dc3545", relation_colors)
    pos_hist_html = make_event_chips(events.get("pos_hist", []), "#2ecc71", relation_colors) if events.get("pos_hist") else ""
    neg_hist_html = make_event_chips(events.get("neg_hist", []), "#e74c3c", relation_colors) if events.get("neg_hist") else ""
    hist_html = ""
    if events.get("pos_hist"):
        hist_html += f"<span class='u-s055'>{pos_hist_html}</span>"
    if events.get("neg_hist"):
        hist_html += f"<span class='u-s271'>{neg_hist_html}</span>"

    votes = p.get("votes_received", [])
    if votes:
        vote_rows = []
        for v in votes:
            voter = v.get("voter")
            count = v.get("count", 1)
            is_revealed = v.get("revealed", False)
            count_badge = f'<span class="fs-2xs u-s148">{count}×</span>' if count > 1 else ""
            border = relation_colors.get(voter, "#666")
            reveal_badge = ' <span class="fs-sm u-s025">👁️</span>' if is_revealed else ""
            voter_avatar = av(voter, 36, border) if voter in AVATARS else ""
            voter_first = voter.split()[0] if voter else ""
            vote_rows.append(
                f"<div class='u-s334'>"
                f"{voter_avatar}"
                f"<span class='fs-base u-s272'>{voter_first}</span>"
                f"{count_badge}{reveal_badge}</div>"
            )
        votes_html = ''.join(vote_rows)
    else:
        votes_html = ""

    sinc = p.get("sincerao", {})
    sinc_summary = sinc.get("summary", {})
    sinc_current = sinc.get("current", {})
    sinc_season = sinc.get("season", {})
    sinc_total = sinc_summary.get("received_total", 0) + sinc_summary.get("given_total", 0)

    # Build sincerao HTML: Recebeu + Fez for current week, then season history
    sincerao_html = ""
    if sinc_total > 0:
        sinc_parts = []

        # -- Current week: Recebeu --
        current_received = sinc_current.get("received", [])
        if current_received:
            chips = ""
            for ix in current_received:
                emoji = ix.get("emoji", "")
                actor_first = ix.get("actor", "").split()[0] if ix.get("actor") else ""
                label = ix.get("label", "")
                valence = ix.get("valence", "neg")
                border_color = "#2d8659" if valence == "pos" else "#b33"
                chips += (
                    f"<span class='u-s060 fs-2xs' style='border-left:2px solid {border_color};padding-left:3px'>"
                    f"{emoji} {actor_first} <span style='opacity:0.7'>{label}</span></span> "
                )
            sinc_parts.append(
                f"<div style='display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:2px 6px;align-items:baseline'>"
                f"<span class='fs-2xs' style='opacity:0.6;min-width:50px'>Recebeu</span>{chips}</div>"
            )

        # -- Current week: Fez --
        current_given = sinc_current.get("given", [])
        if current_given:
            chips = ""
            for ix in current_given:
                emoji = ix.get("emoji", "")
                target_first = ix.get("target", "").split()[0] if ix.get("target") else ""
                label = ix.get("label", "")
                valence = ix.get("valence", "neg")
                border_color = "#2d8659" if valence == "pos" else "#b33"
                chips += (
                    f"<span class='u-s060 fs-2xs' style='border-left:2px solid {border_color};padding-left:3px'>"
                    f"{emoji} {target_first} <span style='opacity:0.7'>{label}</span></span> "
                )
            sinc_parts.append(
                f"<div style='display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:2px 6px;align-items:baseline'>"
                f"<span class='fs-2xs' style='opacity:0.6;min-width:50px'>Fez</span>{chips}</div>"
            )

        # -- Season history (collapsed): both received AND given per past week --
        received_by_week = sinc_season.get("received_by_week", [])
        given_by_week = sinc_season.get("given_by_week", [])
        current_wk = sinc.get("current_week")

        past_weeks_set = set()
        for w in received_by_week:
            if w.get("week") != current_wk:
                past_weeks_set.add(w["week"])
        for w in given_by_week:
            if w.get("week") != current_wk:
                past_weeks_set.add(w["week"])

        if past_weeks_set:
            recv_lookup = {w["week"]: w["interactions"] for w in received_by_week}
            given_lookup = {w["week"]: w["interactions"] for w in given_by_week}
            history_rows = []
            for wk in sorted(past_weeks_set, reverse=True):
                week_label = f"<span class='fs-2xs' style='opacity:0.6;min-width:24px'>S{wk}</span>"
                week_parts = []

                # Received sub-row
                recv_ints = recv_lookup.get(wk, [])
                if recv_ints:
                    chips_html = ""
                    for ix in recv_ints:
                        emoji = ix.get("emoji", "")
                        actor_first = ix.get("actor", "").split()[0] if ix.get("actor") else ""
                        label = ix.get("label", "")
                        valence = ix.get("valence", "neg")
                        border_color = "#2d8659" if valence == "pos" else "#b33"
                        chips_html += (
                            f"<span class='u-s060 fs-2xs' style='border-left:2px solid {border_color};padding-left:3px'>"
                            f"{emoji} {actor_first} <span style='opacity:0.7'>{label}</span></span> "
                        )
                    week_parts.append(
                        f"<div style='display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:2px 6px;align-items:baseline'>"
                        f"{week_label}<span class='fs-2xs' style='opacity:0.5'>Recebeu</span>{chips_html}</div>"
                    )

                # Given sub-row
                given_ints = given_lookup.get(wk, [])
                if given_ints:
                    chips_html = ""
                    for ix in given_ints:
                        emoji = ix.get("emoji", "")
                        target_first = ix.get("target", "").split()[0] if ix.get("target") else ""
                        label = ix.get("label", "")
                        valence = ix.get("valence", "neg")
                        border_color = "#2d8659" if valence == "pos" else "#b33"
                        chips_html += (
                            f"<span class='u-s060 fs-2xs' style='border-left:2px solid {border_color};padding-left:3px'>"
                            f"{emoji} {target_first} <span style='opacity:0.7'>{label}</span></span> "
                        )
                    given_label = f"<span style='min-width:24px'></span>" if recv_ints else week_label
                    week_parts.append(
                        f"<div style='display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:2px 6px;align-items:baseline'>"
                        f"{given_label}<span class='fs-2xs' style='opacity:0.5'>Fez</span>{chips_html}</div>"
                    )

                history_rows.extend(week_parts)
```
